title: Why This Is the Most Exciting Time to Be Human | Ken Ono, Axiom Math
summary: Ken Ono argues that humans cannot compete with AI on raw knowledge and that true intelligence in the age of AI lies in curiosity and human judgment rather than information retrieval. He draws on mathematician Ramanujan's legacy to illustrate how unconventional genius and discovery remain distinctly human capabilities that systems miss.
